stemHtml: A crew is preparing for a flight from Canada to Tokyo. What factors should they consider for this flight?

options.a: In Canada Airspace, Northern Domestic Airspace (NDA), VORs are in reference to True North.
options.b: In Canada Airspace, Northern Domestic Airspace (NDA), VORs are in reference to Magnetic North.
options.c: Due to reduced vertical field strength, the compass is unreliable.
